mapper.insert:
insert into student
student_no, name, gender, class_id, enrollment_date, id_card, phone, password,
values
#{studentNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{classId}, #{enrollmentDate}, #{idCard}, #{phone}, #{password},
mapper.delete:
delete from student where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select s.id, s.student_no, s.name, s.gender, s.class_id, c.class_name, s.enrollment_date, s.status, s.id_card, s.phone, s.account_status, s.create_time, s.update_time from student s left join class c on s.class_id = c.id where s.id = #{id}

select s.id, s.student_no, s.name, s.gender, s.class_id, c.class_name, s.enrollment_date, s.status, s.id_card, s.phone, s.account_status, s.password, s.create_time, s.update_time from student s left join class c on s.class_id = c.id where s.student_no = #{studentNo} and s.status = '正常'
